goal.title: Production-Quality Certification
goal.description: Promote remaining seed captures to PRC where evidence supports, add objective quality review gate, implement 2 renderer improvements, certify 12 key captures locally

checks: truth final hash present for gameplay/replay/consequence states
not duplicate image for unrelated slot

renderer_improvements.name: Depth-Based Fog Tuning per Role
renderer_improvements.description: Adjust fog density and color based on capture role (menu=light fog, combat=moderate fog, cinematic=heavy fog)
renderer_improvements.implementation_notes: Add fog_density and fog_color uniforms controlled by game-flow state

renderer_improvements.name: Camera Depth Precision Fix
renderer_improvements.description: Adjust near/far plane and use logarithmic depth to reduce z-fighting and improve depth buffer precision for distant objects
renderer_improvements.implementation_notes: Update projection matrix calculation to use log-depth buffer

execution_plan.description: Inspect all 65 captures, categorize by status (seed/PRC/ready), identify which of 13 seed captures can be promoted to PRC
For each seed capture, check if asset+material+physics+profile metadata exists. If yes, promote to PRC and update renderer classification logic

execution_plan.action: Implement renderer improvement RI-01: depth-based fog tuning
execution_plan.description: Add fog_control uniform to shader, compute fog based on game-flow state, regenerate affected captures

execution_plan.action: Implement renderer improvement RI-02: camera depth precision fix
execution_plan.description: Update projection matrix to use log-depth buffer, regenerate affected captures

execution_plan.action: Run objective quality review gate on 12 key captures
execution_plan.description: For each key capture, run all 10 quality checks, record pass/fail/exact blocker
For captures affected by renderer improvements, compute perceptual hash delta between Unit-053 and Unit-054
Verify no two captures with different IDs share identical image hashes (unless documented as explicit variants)
Test asserts: 56/56 slots filled, no duplicates, 12 key captures pass quality review, 2 renderer improvements active, image hashes changed for affected captures

execution_plan.action: Run full verification suite and write final report
execution_plan.description: Run cargo build/test/verify, tools/verify.sh, audit_truth.sh, presentation_truth_isolation, capture_high_fidelity_screens.sh, visual_benchmark, final_acceptance
Document Unit-054 outcomes in ledger, commit with message 'Unit-054: production-quality certification + 2 renderer improvements + 12 key captures locally certified', push to origin
execution_plan.tool: git add .hermes/atomic_ledger.md && git commit -m '...' && git push
